case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS ALGARVA, SUZANNE M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,016.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ALGARVA, SUZANNE M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALGARVA, SUZANNE M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALGARVA, SUZANNE M. $2,016.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,041.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $25.00 BIWE EKLY BEGINNING ON 2/1/96 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED,ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE.
